title: EnrichmentResult
description: A single enriched functional term from STRING functional enrichment analysis.

description.description: Human-readable description of the functional term

number_of_genes.description: Number of input genes annotated to this term

number_of_genes_in_background.description: Number of background proteome genes annotated to this term

ncbiTaxonId.description: NCBI taxon ID of the species

inputGenes.description: Comma-separated STRING identifiers of input genes annotated to this term

preferredNames.description: Comma-separated preferred gene names annotated to this term

fdr.description: Benjamini-Hochberg false discovery rate corrected p-value
